name: RAPP Test Neighbor
title: Public Neighborhood — Submission-Driven
incantation: ANVIL BRONZE FORGE ANVIL ANVIL RUNE SILVER

abilities.name: Submit
abilities.text: Open a PR adding submissions/<slug>/{meta.json, piece.<ext>}. License travels with the piece.

abilities.name: Vote
abilities.text: React on the announcement Issue. 🩵 = belongs in the canvas; 👎 = doesn't fit.

abilities.name: Remix
abilities.text: Open a new submission with remix_of: <other-slug>. The lineage is permanent.

flavor_text: The canvas IS the union of contributions.
avatar_svg:
